He will achieve in all his ventures by his discriminative ability. Several
women will try to entice him and make advances to him; but they will fail in
all their attempts. With Venus conjunct the Sun, and Mars in the next house,
he will get a bad reputation and curses from women. As a result of this he will
suffer a lot.
The Sun's contact with Saturn and Rahu too indicates that he will be
employed in an operation unit.
